title: Jae-Moo Lee
compiled_truth: Jae-Moo Lee is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-24 to 2001-05-23), Jae-Moo Lee sent 2 and received 9 emails, totalling 11 interactions.
